sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n84264" key="poikili/as" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ποικῐλ-ίας</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, a kind of <sense id="n84264.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">fish,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0584.tlg001:20" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Philosteph.Hist.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">20</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
